scripts.dev: tmux kill-session -t dough 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :4200 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; tmux new-session -d -s dough 'bun run packages/server/src/index.ts 2>&1; read' && sleep 2 && tmux new-window -t dough 'cd $PWD && bun run packages/tui/src/index.tsx 2>&1' && tmux select-window -t dough:1 && tmux attach -t dough
